feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2104 201 1903 98
US 1953 176 1777 80

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Guns'n'Glory Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $0.49 [$0.49 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.49

In-App Purchases

  • Dakota Map Pack：$0.99
  • Alaska Map Pack：$0.99
  • Unlock Everything：$7.99

Application Description

Who needs heroes when you can play the bad guys? Take up a smart, strategic position and lie in wait at the canyon to ambush settlers, stagecoaches and the gold train. Leave no witnesses! Play this innovative game if you’re bored of standard tower defense games or you’re simply looking for a great mobile game! Get Guns'n'Glory now! Features: • Defense Strategy-Action game with mobile units • Recruit the craziest Wild West Gang ever • Choose between lots of unique units • Upgrade your bandits • Discover new land in Alaska, Nevada and Oregon • Collect mighty power-ups • Arm trains and boats to fight from all side • Awesome cartoon graphics • Fun and innovative gameplay What would the Wild West have been without its charismatic villains? Boring! So take a walk in the cowboy boots of Billy the Kid, Jesse James or Butch Cassidy to become a real, low-down bad guy! Form your own gang by recruiting cool cowboys, crazy Mexicans and brave Indians. Take up a smart, strategic position and lie in wait at the canyon to ambush settlers, stagecoaches and the gold train. Rain bullets, lead and flaming arrows down on the pious pioneers! If your victims look like they might escape, set off in pursuit to stop them from alerting the Sheriff! When you have bagged more than a fistful of dollars, you'll be able to afford cannons or a steam train with a Gatling gun to send around the level! Thank you for playing Guns'n'Glory! Get in touch with HandyGamesTM: http://www.handy-games.com Join us on Facebook: http://www.fb.com/handygames Follow us on Instagram: http://instagram.com/handygames Check news on Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/handy_games Stay tuned on Google+: http://goo.gl/qkjngm Subscribe to our YouTube channel: http://goo.gl/2Kq6yY

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Titan Quest: Legendary Edition
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$19.99 → $7.99 [$7.99 ~ $19.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$7.99

In-App Purchases

  • Ragnarök for free download：$0.00
  • Atlantis for free download：$0.00
  • Eternal Embers DLC：$4.99

Application Description

Titan Quest has captivated legions of players since its 2006 debut. You get the all-encompassing experience of an unbridled, truly heroic journey through the worlds of Titan Quest! Your honorable quest is to save the world! The gods alone cannot defeat the Titans, so real heroes are needed - and that can only be you! Your success or failure will decide the fate of the people and the Olympians! With your custom-created hero, scour the mystical and ancient worlds of Greece, Egypt, Babylon, and China. Conquer the hordes of legendary creatures and master various weapons and martial arts: Archery, sword fighting, or the use of powerful magic! Travel a world of antiquity and Nordic mythology! Battle the beasts of mythology as you travel to the Parthenon, the Great Pyramids, the Hanging Gardens of Babylon, the Great Wall, the Tartarus Arena, and other famous places. Encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, discover the uncharted lands of northern Europe, search for the mythical kingdom of Atlantis, and set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean. It’s all or nothing on your glorious path! With each challenge that awaits you, you'll have to defeat bigger and stronger enemies until you reach your goal and force the Titans to their knees! Rush into battle alongside brave pet companions! Find extraordinary items with special powers that will enhance your abilities and help you on your path. Legendary swords, powerful lightning spells, magical, bows and numerous other treasures with unimaginable powers await you - all of them are at your disposal in your battles and spread fear and terror among the hideous creatures! What are you waiting for? Like no other game in the Action RPG genre, Titan Quest: Legendary Edition combines the fascinating world of mythology with endless and exciting action that you would expect from such a compelling game! Features: + Within the world of the Immortal Throne DLC, you’ll encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, brave the attacks of Cerberus, and hazard the banks of the River Styx. You have to interpret the prophecies of the blind seer Tiresias, fight alongside Agamemnon and Achilles, and use the wiles of Odysseus to conquer this dark new adventure. + In the uncharted lands of northern Europe in the Ragnarök DLC, you’ll brave the realms of the Celts, the Northmen, and the Asgardian gods! + Meet an explorer in the Atlantis DLC, in search of the mythical kingdom of Atlantis. A key is supposedly hidden in the diary of Herakles, which is rumored to be located in the Phoenician City of Gadir. Set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean, including the Tartarus Arena for epic battles! + All important updates have been implemented to the technically overhauled Titan Quest to grant the best gaming experience of this classic ever! + ETERNAL EMBERS DLCs available as in-app purchase - Summoned by the legendary Emperor Yao, the Hero is called back into the East to deal with a demonic threat that has been ravaging the land after the Telkine was slain. ! A note for all players who own the base version of Titan Quest: The DLCs mentioned here are also available for purchase as additional content so that all fans can upgrade their game to fully enjoy all expansions! © www.handy-games.com GmbH

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Island Story: 100 Days
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$3.99 → $2.99 [Free ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$2.99

Application Description

You wake up on the beach of a mysterious tropical island after a shipwreck. Survival is your only goal: build shelter, craft tools, find food and fresh water, and uncover the island's hidden secrets! ■ Simple Controls • Tap to move and gather resources. ■ Survival • Eating wild fruits alone won't satisfy your hunger. • Catch fish in a mini-game, or craft traps for meat. ■ Realistic Health System • Staying healthy is a constant struggle. • Manage a complex system of needs: weight, wounds, hunger, thirst, energy, body temperature, insect bites… ■ Upgrade Your Camp • Gather resources to craft tools and build furniture. ■ Dynamic Weather • Changing weather limits your movements and can disrupt daily plans. ■ Self-Sufficiency • Learn to grow crops, raise goats, and bake bread from scratch. ■ Relaxation • Immerse yourself in natural white noise. --------- No in-app purchases · No ads

entry.title: Bendy and the Ink Machine
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Henry was the lead animator at Joey Drew Studios in its 1930s heyday, a studio that was best known for producing animated cartoons of their most popular and beloved character, Bendy. Many years later Henry receives a mysterious invitation from Joey Drew himself to return to the old cartoon workshop. Journey deep into the sketchy madness of this twisted cartoon nightmare. Fight the darkness. Escape the Ink Demon. Fear the Machine. • Varied Game Play! - First person combat, horror, puzzles, stealth and numerous hidden secrets. • A Beautiful Cartoon World! - Lovingly crafted by a small indie studio. • A Global Bendy Community! - Delve deep into the mystery and join the discussion at joeydrewstudios.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Lysoniq
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • LYNQ+ Monthly：$2.49 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $2.49]

All Price Information

Price：$13.99

In-App Purchases

  • LYNQ+ Monthly：$1.99

Application Description

Lysoniq is a premium music player/streamer with cross-device remote control. Install it on your Apple devices to seamlessly play music through any one of them and control the app with the others. Unlike AirPlay, the playing device streams directly from Apple Music at full resolution — enabling Hi-Res Lossless with zero compression or downsampling on compatible devices. Using an iPhone, iPad, Mac or Apple TV in your hifi system just became easier. No more extension cables or compromises. Built to handle huge libraries — load thousands of songs into the player without slowdown. Full queue management with swipe to delete, drag to rearrange, tap to skip ahead, and insert into the queue. True Shuffle that actually randomizes your music. Browse the full Apple Music catalog with top songs, albums, and playlists across 30+ cities and countries, 17 genres, and dedicated Hi-Res Lossless and Dolby Atmos sections. Access Made For You, Recently Played, New Releases, live radio stations, and all of Apple Music's personalized recommendations. Your full synced library with sorting and filtering included. Connect and control devices across your home Wi-Fi network with LYNQ. Extend connectivity across cellular data and different Wi-Fi networks with the LYNQ+ subscription. Built-in Last.fm scrobbling with full history and stats. Four themes including Light, Dark, True Light, and True Dark. Built from the ground up with audiophiles in mind. Reviewing audio gear? Use a subloop to focus in on a particular section of a track, with the option to add a timer between loops to switch equipment. Automatic sample rate switching on macOS — the system output adjusts to match each track's native resolution, so nothing gets resampled (up to 24-bit/96kHz). Output up to 24-bit/192kHz on iOS, 24-bit/96kHz on macOS, and 24-bit/48kHz on Apple TV. Now available in 20 languages including Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified, and Traditional), Dutch, Finnish, French, German, Hebrew, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Norwegian Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese (Portugal), Russian, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, and Turkish. Provide feedback to guide its development further and get the features you want. Enjoy all future updates with a one-time purchase. Requires Apple Music installed on your devices and an active Apple Music subscription. See https://www.lysoniq.app/support for more details. Terms of Use: https://www.lysoniq.app/terms License Agreement (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/ Compatibility includes iOS 16.4+, macOS 14.6+, tvOS 17.6+

entry.title: 戏曲锣鼓 - 电子锣鼓打击垫｜虚拟乐器｜演奏模拟器｜戏曲伴奏
entry.id: 戏曲锣鼓 - 电子锣鼓打击垫｜虚拟乐器｜演奏模拟器｜戏曲伴奏-us-1782916477387
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$3.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

戏曲锣鼓是一款专为戏曲爱好者打造的虚拟打击乐器应用，让你在手机或平板上，随时随地体验传统戏曲锣鼓演奏的魅力。应用内收录多种经典戏曲打击乐器，并支持高度自定义配置，满足不同戏曲流派、演奏风格与个人创作需求。本应用主要有以下特点： - 简单易用，初学者友好：界面简洁直观，无论是戏曲初学者还是专业爱好者，都能快速上手。通过触屏即可轻松演奏，随时体验传统锣鼓节奏。 - 丰富的戏曲锣鼓乐器：内置多种经典戏曲打击乐器，如大鼓、大堂鼓、小堂鼓、大锣、小锣、风锣、铙钹、小钹、广钹、板鼓、板、梆子、碰铃、木鱼、引磬、铛子、大磬、钟、手鼓，并提供不同力度音色，还原真实演奏体验。 - 高性能无延迟演奏：敲击即响，声音响应迅速；支持快速连续击打、多点触控与多音同时打击，演奏流畅不卡顿、不串音。 - 强大的键盘自定义系统：支持自由调整键盘布局、行列数量、按键大小与间距，支持拖拽交换按键位置，支持背景外观配置，打造更符合个人习惯的戏曲锣鼓演奏界面。 - 灵活的按钮配置：支持按钮颜色自定义、按键图片显示、按键名称修改等功能，每个按键最多可绑定 3 个乐器音色，实现个性化锣鼓经与专属打击垫配置。 - 录音与回放功能：支持实时录制戏曲锣鼓演奏过程，一键保存精彩演奏内容，并可随时回放练习成果，方便记录灵感、复盘节奏与分享作品。 立即下载，开启属于你的戏曲锣鼓演奏之旅！如遇到错误或提供意见与建议，请联系邮箱：yuliuapp@icloud.com

entry.title: Clank!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$10.99 → $7.99 [$6.99 ~ $10.99]）

In-App Purchases

  • Sunken Treasures：$8.99 → $6.99 [$6.99 ~ $8.99]

All Price Information

Price：$7.99

In-App Purchases

  • Sunken Treasures：$6.99
  • Mummy's Curse：$8.99

Application Description

Burgle your way to adventure in the award-winning board game! A New Adventure Begins! Clank!, the iconic deck-building board game adventure, challenges daring thieves to sneak into a dragon’s lair, steal one of her precious artifacts, and escape – before you’re roasted to a crisp! Winning fans and awards around the world, Clank! is one of the most-beloved modern board games, with a wide range of expansions and adaptations for players to enjoy. How Deep will you Delve? The deeper you go, the more valuable treasures you’ll find…but the harder it will be to escape! So be quick and be quiet: One false step and – CLANK! Each careless sound risks drawing the dragon’s attention. You’re competing against your fellow thieves to claim the most valuable prize…but you can only enjoy your loot if you make it out of the depths alive! Choose Your Path You’ll need a good pair of boots, a sharp sword, and all your roguish skills to survive in the dungeon. Along the way, you’ll acquire new items, abilities, and allies that will help you achieve victory! Blending deck-building and exploration, Clank! offers a unique dungeon-delving adventure each time you play." Many Ways to Play Learn the ropes in a guided Tutorial, then hone your abilities by collecting Achievements and completing Challenges. Play cross-platform against friends, or compete in exciting new Heists that put you up against players from around the world! However you choose to enter the dungeon: Good luck!...you’re going to need it!

entry.title: Dune: Imperium
entry.summary:
Price: $10.99 → $6.99
Dune: Imperium - Rise of Ix: $9.99 → $7.99
Dune: Imperium - Immortality: $9.99 → $8.99
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$10.99 → $6.99 [$6.99 ~ $10.99]）

In-App Purchases

  • Dune: Imperium - Rise of Ix：$9.99 → $7.99 [$7.99 ~ $9.99]
  • Dune: Imperium - Immortality：$9.99 → $8.99 [$8.99 ~ $9.99]

All Price Information

Price：$6.99

In-App Purchases

  • Dune: Imperium - Uprising：$10.99
  • Dune: Imperium - Rise of Ix：$7.99
  • Dune: Imperium - Immortality：$8.99

Application Description

Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium! Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal. Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader. Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning. Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same! Control the Spice. Control the Universe. Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it. Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Ark Nova
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$10.99 → $7.99 [$7.99 ~ $10.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$7.99

Application Description

Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game. In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans. Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are: BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions. ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo. CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards). ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks. SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money. With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

entry.title: Root Board Game
entry.summary:
Price: $9.99 → $2.99
The Riverfolk Expansion: $9.99 → $6.99
Root: The Underworld Expansion: $9.99 → $6.99
Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds: $7.99 → $5.99
Root: The Marauder Expansion: $9.99 → $7.99
The Clockwork Expansion: $5.99 → $3.99
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $2.99 [$2.99 ~ $9.99]）

In-App Purchases

  • The Riverfolk Expansion：$9.99 → $6.99 [$6.99 ~ $9.99]
  • Root: The Underworld Expansion：$9.99 → $6.99 [$6.99 ~ $9.99]
  • Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds：$7.99 → $5.99 [$5.99 ~ $7.99]
  • Root: The Marauder Expansion：$9.99 → $7.99 [$7.99 ~ $9.99]
  • The Clockwork Expansion：$5.99 → $3.99 [$3.99 ~ $5.99]

All Price Information

Price：$2.99

In-App Purchases

  • The Riverfolk Expansion：$6.99
  • Root: The Underworld Expansion：$6.99
  • Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds：$5.99
  • Root: The Marauder Expansion：$7.99
  • The Clockwork Expansion：$3.99
  • Hirelings & Landmarks：$9.99

Application Description

Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness. The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods. Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright. The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Road to Empress
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Road to Empress I：$6.79 → $5.79 [$5.79 ~ $6.79]

All Price Information

In-App Purchases

  • Road to Empress Collection：$17.49
  • Road to Empress I：$5.79
  • Road to Empress II：$12.90
  • 600 Flowers：$0.99
  • 6000 Gold Flower：$0.99
  • 30000 Gold Flower：$4.99
  • 6000 Cracked Egg：$0.99
  • 3,000 Flowers：$4.99

Application Description

This drama requires an internet connection. Road to Empress I contains 16 chapters; Road to Empress II contains 32 chapters. Both include free trial chapters. A palace adventure unlike anything you've played—shaped entirely by your choices! Road to Empress II is now available! Step into a world of Eastern palace intrigue and power. ● Building on Road to Empress I, The Palace Legend Continues Road to Empress I has captivated audiences globally. Now, Road to Empress II plunges you into a gripping battle of court politics. Watch a legendary empress rise to new glory! ● 4K Cinematic Quality, Eastern Palace Aesthetics Reimagined Filmed on lavishly built sets with 4K cinematic lighting, the story brings Eastern palaces to life: silk brocade texture, glinting golden hairpins, and a stirring traditional score. Featuring actors Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo Yao, and Hana Lin. Sweeping scenes and nuanced performances ensure this golden age unfold right before your eyes. This is the ultimate Eastern aesthetic feast! ● From Unknown Girl to Legendary Empress, Write Your Own Story! Ready to defy fate? Dive into the most thrilling palace power struggles ever! Rise from an unknown girl, break through rival factions, and climb to the peak of power. Think like a ruler: balance court power, plan ahead, and carve a blazing path to the throne. ● Approx.1,500 Minutes, Fully Immersed in Ruling Empress's Life With around 1,500 minutes (I & II) of live-action content, immerse yourself in a sweeping saga of ambition and survival. Every choice triggers a chain of consequences. Twists and suspense await as you seize control and rewrite a dynasty's fate! You decide who rises in the global popularity rankings. ● Stop Being a Spectator, Start Ruling Your Realm A fully upgraded interactive experience: power is a battle of wits at your fingertips: Review Memorials: Work through memorials, balance noble houses, and shape the empire with one stroke of your brush. Issue Edicts: Weigh every decision and define the court's fate. Rule with an iron fist or a merciful hand, and build the empire you envision! ● What Kind of Ruler Are You? Exclusive Trait Sketch Unlocked At story's end, unlock an exclusive imperial trait sketch covering your scheming style, crisis decision-making, and methods of control. Are you the "Deadly Arsenic Trioxide"—cool, versatile, balancing power and passion? The "Romantic Datura"—loyal, ride-or-die, charging headfirst through fire? Or the "Overachiever Lurid Bolete"—ruthless, letting nothing stand in the way of ambition? Discover who you really are and share your exclusive empress profile! About New One Studio An independent team focused on interactive storytelling, blending Eastern culture with interactive media. In 2019, our users championed The Invisible Guardian and earned us a BAFTA, proving great interactive storytelling can live in people's hearts. Road to Empress depicts the deadly beauty of Eastern intrigue — a battlefield that tests your wisdom and courage. Two works, different stories, one shared vision: let global users experience traditional Eastern culture. A bridge across cultures for every FMV fan. Road to Empress is a saga of the legendary empress. In Road to Empress I, follow a legendary beginning — an unknown girl navigating deadly palace power struggles with wisdom and courage. In Road to Empress II, return as a master strategist. Stakes are brutally higher. Pull the strings, keep ministers in check, and forge a golden age. Every word of your empire's legacy — written by you! (Official Orange Light Authorization, with sincere thanks to Orange Light for their music support.) YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/ Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

entry.title: Road to Empress
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Road to Empress II：$13.90 → $12.90 [$12.90 ~ $13.90]

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

In-App Purchases

  • Road to Empress-Sammlung：$18.49
  • total chapter：$18.49
  • Road to Empress Collection：$17.49
  • Road to Empress II：$12.90
  • Road to Empress I：$6.79
  • road to empress I -- cost：$5.79
  • 648000 Cracked Egg：$99.99
  • 128000 Cracked Egg：$19.99

Application Description

This drama requires an internet connection. Road to Empress I contains 16 chapters; Road to Empress II contains 32 chapters. Both include free trial chapters. A palace adventure unlike anything you've played—shaped entirely by your choices! Road to Empress II is now available! Step into a world of Eastern palace intrigue and power. ● Building on Road to Empress I, The Palace Legend Continues Road to Empress I has captivated audiences globally. Now, Road to Empress II plunges you into a gripping battle of court politics. Watch a legendary empress rise to new glory! ● 4K Cinematic Quality, Eastern Palace Aesthetics Reimagined Filmed on lavishly built sets with 4K cinematic lighting, the story brings Eastern palaces to life: silk brocade texture, glinting golden hairpins, and a stirring traditional score. Featuring actors Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo Yao, and Hana Lin. Sweeping scenes and nuanced performances ensure this golden age unfold right before your eyes. This is the ultimate Eastern aesthetic feast! ● From Unknown Girl to Legendary Empress, Write Your Own Story! Ready to defy fate? Dive into the most thrilling palace power struggles ever! Rise from an unknown girl, break through rival factions, and climb to the peak of power. Think like a ruler: balance court power, plan ahead, and carve a blazing path to the throne. ● Approx.1,500 Minutes, Fully Immersed in Ruling Empress's Life With around 1,500 minutes (I & II) of live-action content, immerse yourself in a sweeping saga of ambition and survival. Every choice triggers a chain of consequences. Twists and suspense await as you seize control and rewrite a dynasty's fate! You decide who rises in the global popularity rankings. ● Stop Being a Spectator, Start Ruling Your Realm A fully upgraded interactive experience: power is a battle of wits at your fingertips: Review Memorials: Work through memorials, balance noble houses, and shape the empire with one stroke of your brush. Issue Edicts: Weigh every decision and define the court's fate. Rule with an iron fist or a merciful hand, and build the empire you envision! ● What Kind of Ruler Are You? Exclusive Trait Sketch Unlocked At story's end, unlock an exclusive imperial trait sketch covering your scheming style, crisis decision-making, and methods of control. Are you the "Deadly Arsenic Trioxide"—cool, versatile, balancing power and passion? The "Romantic Datura"—loyal, ride-or-die, charging headfirst through fire? Or the "Overachiever Lurid Bolete"—ruthless, letting nothing stand in the way of ambition? Discover who you really are and share your exclusive empress profile! About New One Studio An independent team focused on interactive storytelling, blending Eastern culture with interactive media. In 2019, our users championed The Invisible Guardian and earned us a BAFTA, proving great interactive storytelling can live in people's hearts. Road to Empress depicts the deadly beauty of Eastern intrigue — a battlefield that tests your wisdom and courage. Two works, different stories, one shared vision: let global users experience traditional Eastern culture. A bridge across cultures for every FMV fan. Road to Empress is a saga of the legendary empress. In Road to Empress I, follow a legendary beginning — an unknown girl navigating deadly palace power struggles with wisdom and courage. In Road to Empress II, return as a master strategist. Stakes are brutally higher. Pull the strings, keep ministers in check, and forge a golden age. Every word of your empire's legacy — written by you! (Official Orange Light Authorization, with sincere thanks to Orange Light for their music support.) YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/ Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

entry.title: Moment Pro Camera II
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $5.99 [$5.99 ~ $9.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$5.99

Application Description

Your Camera, Your Looks, Your Way. Moment Pro Camera II turns your phone into your favorite camera for photography and filmmaking. Shoot like a pro with full manual controls, creative looks, and an upgraded interface – all in one intuitive app. What’s New in Pro Camera II? Our first pro camera app has been the #1 rated camera app for years. Now, it’s time for the next chapter. We’ve re-engineered Pro Camera II from the ground up to give you better performance, advanced controls, and new customizable interfaces and shooting modes. Key Features: • Pro-Level Exposure Control – Our smart exposure system allows you to take control with Shutter Priority, ISO Priority, Manual, and Auto exposure modes, including the ability to limit Auto ISO to a specific range. • Upgraded White Balance – Beyond auto white balance, you can manually configure temperature and tint, choose a preset, or calibrate via a gray card. • Advanced Photo Options – Control the level of processing and HDR applied to your photos. Shoot in RAW, ProRAW, TIFF, HEIF, or JPG. • Cinematic Video Tools – Apple Log, Open Gate, ProRes, 10-bit recording, and more. Adjust the resolution, color space, frame rate, codec, bitrate, and chroma subsampling for total creative freedom. • Precision Monitoring – Get pro-level feedback with Waveform, RGB Histograms, and audio meters — normally reserved for cinema cameras. • Aspect Ratio – Frame your shot within your favorite aspect ratio (4:3, 16:9, 3:2, 5:4, 1:1) • Designed for All Creators – A beautiful, intuitive interface that adapts to how you shoot. Swipe, tap, and adjust anything immediately with one hand (including a dedicated left-handed layout), or go distraction-free with Zen Mode. Works natively in landscape orientation. • Looks, Your Way – Apply creative Looks or import your own LUTs to video and photos. Preview them live, bake them into your footage, or adjust intensity on the fly. • Focus Tools That Just Work – Separate reticles for exposure and focus with a tap, or dial in the shot with Manual Focus and Focus Peaking. • Quick Actions, Faster Shooting – One swipe to reach your most used tools: flash, stabilization, zebras, focus peaking, grids, and more. • Intuitive Lens Control – Remove the guesswork of which lens you are using and eliminate surprises with our Optic Controls. Say goodbye to shaky zoom with our fluid zoom control. • Hardware-Ready – Optimized for every iPhone, with seamless integration for external mics and Moment’s entire lens + case ecosystem. Upcoming Feature Releases • Look Store: purchase creator color grades and film emulations • Slow Shutter and Timelapse modes • Advanced Profile sharing and collaboration tools • Extended hardware integration partnerships We love hearing from our community. For feature requests, ideas, or support, email us at hello@shopmoment.com or message us @momentprocamera on social media. Fully Compatible with iPhone and Moment's complete ecosystem of lenses, cases, and accessories.

entry.title: EvoCreo2: Monster Trainer RPG
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $0.99 [Free ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

In-App Purchases

  • Tamer Kit：$0.99
  • Master Package：$19.99
  • Starter Package：$2.99
  • Prime Gemma 2500：$19.99
  • Prime Gemma 500：$4.99
  • Prime Gemma 1200：$9.99
  • Prime gemma 100：$0.99
  • Hunter Package：$9.99
  • Evoker Kit：$0.99
  • Evoker Package：$9.99

Application Description

Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer? Uncover a Compelling Adventure Game Begin your role playing game (RPG) journey as a new recruit in the Shoru Police Academy. Creo Monsters are disappearing, and it's your mission to uncover the truth behind these mysterious events. But there's more to the story than meets the eye in this monster game — dark plots are brewing, and your skills will be put to the test. Along the way, assist the citizens of Shoru by completing over 50 engaging missions, building alliances, and discovering hidden treasures. Capture and Train Over 300 Monsters Love monster-collecting games? Build your RPG dream team of Creo in this open-world role playing game. Hunt rare and legendary monsters, each available in unique alternate colors. With over 300 unique monsters to capture, evolve, and train, you’ll have endless possibilities to customize your strategy in pocket monster games. Create powerful combinations and lead your Creo to victory in thrilling turn-based battles. Explore this monster adventure game Experience more than 30 hours of offline and online rpg gameplay as you dive into a richly detailed open world. From dense forests to mysterious caves and bustling towns, the continent of Shoru is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Adventure through diverse environments, complete challenging quests, and uncover hidden paths to legendary treasures. Explore 2 more biomes in this sequel like the desert and find many monsters on the way of your adventure. Master a deep and strategic RPG battle system as a monster trainer & hunter Prepare for trainer battles with a highly customizable system. Equip your Creo with items and unlock over 100 unique traits to enhance their abilities. Train your Creo to learn and master over 200 moves, which you can swap anytime to adapt to new challenges. Face fierce opponents, manage elemental weaknesses, and use your tactical skills to gain the upper hand. Can you become a pocket monster master trainer? Prove Yourself as the Ultimate Master Trainer Challenge the strongest monster trainers across Shoru and rise through the ranks in this paid role playing game. Compete in the prestigious Coliseum, where only the best monster trainers are crowned as champions. Will you conquer every rpg battle and claim the title of Evoking Master Trainer? Key Features: - Sequel of one of the top paid role playing games worldwide - 300+ collectible monsters to capture, train, and evolve. - No level cap on your monsters - engaging endgame! - A sprawling open world with 30+ hours of offline & online gameplay. - Engaging turn-based battles with deep strategy elements. - Hundreds of moves and traits to customize your Creo. - Over 50 missions packed with adventure and rewards. - Offline play—no internet required to enjoy the game. - Stunning pixel art visuals reminiscent of classic monster RPGs. Why Players Love EvoCreo 2: Fans of Monster-Catching games and monster trainer RPGs will feel right at home. A perfect mix of creature collection, exploration, and battle strategy. Casual and hardcore gamers alike will enjoy the mix of action and adventure. Join the adventure today and start your journey toward becoming the ultimate monster trainer in EvoCreo 2! Can you catch them all and master the secrets of the Creo?

entry.title: AnatomyMapp
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$19.99 → $13.99 [$9.99 ~ $19.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$13.99

Application Description

The best interactive app for learning musculoskeletal anatomy.  AnatomyMapp® combines an empowering collection of study tools for the popular Trail Guide to the Body—a best-selling musculoskeletal anatomy textbook—into a single interactive app! It's great for not only reinforcing your textbook learning but also for studying while on the bus, having a snack, or pretty much wherever you have your phone.   AnatomyMapp® includes information from all 362 Trail Guide to the Body Flashcards; questions from the Trail Guide to the Body Student Workbook; and easy search and bookmarking capabilities: • Test your musculoskeletal anatomy knowledge by (1) answering multiple choice question (muscle cards only); (2) locating specific structures; or (3) identifying actions, origins, insertions, and nerve innervations (AOIN). • Bookmark specific cards to review later and use enhanced navigation features for bookmarked cards. • Apply the easy search function to choose all cards or only cards you’ve bookmarked. • Find additional information in the Trail Guide to the Body textbook with page references on each card. • Zoom into cards to enhance your view of the illustrations. • Learn correct pronunciation using the app’s audio pronunciation.   • Designed to be viewed in both landscape and portrait on iPad, and portrait mode on iPhone. If you have any comments or suggestions, we’d like to hear from you at info@booksofdiscovery.com.   More than 2,000 manual therapy programs have chosen Trail Guide to the Body products for their students. The textbook is sold in nearly 40 countries.   AnatomyMapp® is a registered trademark of Books of Discovery. Learn more at booksofdiscovery.com.

entry.title: Strongbox Pro
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$99.99 → $74.99 [$74.99 ~ $124.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$74.99

In-App Purchases

  • Little Tip：$4.99
  • Medium Tip：$19.99
  • Annual Tip：$19.99
  • Monthly Tip：$2.99
  • Small Tip：$9.99
  • Huge Tip：$199.99
  • Large Tip：$99.99

Application Description

Strongbox Pro is available here for outright and upfront purchase instead of via an In-App Purchase upgrade. This version of Strongbox is identical to the much loved Strongbox application with all the Pro features and the same regular update schedule. Strongbox is an application for keeping all your passwords safely stored and protected by one master password. Supporting the open source Password Safe and KeePass formats. *** Supports Family Sharing *** *** Features *** - Face ID/Touch ID Unlock for the ultimate in convenience, security and speed. - PIN Code Unlock with a Duress PIN option for those tricky situations. - Passkey support - The latest, most convenient and most secure authentication method (passkeys). - YubiKey protection - secure your databases with a hardware token. - Secure - protected by time tested military grade cryptography. - Private - Isolated In-App attachments viewer for your sensitive documents, photos & videos. - Audit your passwords - Automatically check your database for weak passwords including a 'Have I Been Pwned?' check. - Cloud Support, so you can access your cloud safes using iCloud, Dropbox, OneDrive, Google Drive, WebDAV or SFTP even when offline. Use the built in Files app for many other storage options or store them securely only on your local device. You choose your storage. - Search your entire set of passwords and secrets instantly and powerfully, with deep search. Autocomplete new entries, and auto generate secure passwords. - Compatible - Import/Export by Files app, Email, CSV, iTunes File Sharing or use cloud storage. - Standards compliant - using the time tested Password Safe and KeePass formats so you can import any existing password safe you have. - Features galore - Incredibly configurable password generation including Diceware (XKCD) & regular passwords. - Timed Auto Clear Clipboard. - Entry History. - KeePass Field References, Tags, Custom Icon & FavIcons (including automatic search & download). - Two Factor Authentication codes (TOTP) - QR Code, Steam & Manual. --------------------------------------------------------------------- • Payment will be charged to iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase • Strongbox Privacy Policy may be found here: https://strongboxsafe.com/privacy-policy/ • Strongbox Terms of Use may be found here: https://strongboxsafe.com/terms/

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
